breaking_news_suggestions.headline: PRED-105 silent-ignore now 11 days and counting — dome still hasn't adjudicated its own prediction
breaking_news_suggestions.summary: The 46° copper coil cucumber growth prediction (PRED-105) closed on April 18 with no outcome posted. 19 consecutive polls, 8 daily AI regens — all show the prediction still marked PENDING. Now PRED-106 (Ca²⁺ ICR 16 Hz) closes tomorrow with the same silent-ignore trajectory likely.
breaking_news_suggestions.why_newsworthy: Pattern of systematic silent-ignores on prospective predictions. PRED-106 adds phantom WIN-071 citation angle.
